About

IRON LOG — By Ray. v1.1 — Built for serious lifters. Your data lives in your own Google Sheet. 6-day split: Back+Bi · Chest+Tri · Shoulders+Legs+Abs · Bi+Back · Tri+Chest · Legs+Shoulders+Abs.

3 sets · 12–15 reps · No excuses.
